title: UniVG-R1: Reasoning Guided Universal Visual Grounding with Reinforcement Learning

methodology.approach: Reinforcement Learning with GRPO training and cold-start initialization
methodology.reasoning_capability: Incorporates explicit reasoning process during training

performance.zero_shot_performance: Average 23.4% improvement across four image and video reasoning grounding benchmarks

problem_addressed: Conventional visual grounding struggles with implicit user instructions and complex visual contexts, particularly for multi-image scenarios
